\tzpentry{ID3609}{Gyromagnetic Mode Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3609 introduces Gyromagnetic Mode Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} h_{0i} = -\frac{2}{c}(\vec{\omega}_{\text{gyro}} \times \vec{r})_i \end{equation}
